_note: Remote QNE backend run. Honest general, second reproduction. Roles mapped onto DIRECTLY-connected nodes paris / inssbruck / barcelona (europe network triangle), so entanglement was established over direct links rather than multi-hop. Trimmed to the round_result and classical-message phase.
